element_introduction_order.mastery_context: Player learns to possess bodies to progress through levels and avoid detection
Foundational control scheme for angel character Bob
Players learn consequences of being spotted while possessing bodies
Urban environment with multiple NPCs to possess and hazards to navigate
More complex environmental puzzles using possession across industrial systems
High-stakes environment requiring precise possession and navigation under threat

element_introduction_order.element: Dimensional transport and Moon facility access
element_introduction_order.mastery_context: Final progression sequence with escalated stakes and supernatural threat

typical_relief_triggers: Completing a zone and progressing to next area
rhythm_pattern.pacing_descriptor: Escalating tension from urban stealth sections through industrial complexity to supernatural climax; possession mechanic provides rhythm breaks through body-swapping and repositioning

difficulty_curve.early_game: Introduction to possession mechanics and basic evasion in Faktur cyberpunk city; learning enemy detection systems
difficulty_curve.mid_game: Industrial facility navigation with increased environmental complexity; multiple possession chains required for progression
difficulty_curve.late_game: Nuclear power station and Moon facility infiltration; confrontation with Father Prime and Satan; high-stakes supernatural combat
notable_spikes: First major enemy encounter while learning detection mechanics
Satan boss confrontation and Moon facility destruction sequence

notable_level_patterns.description: Faktur cyberpunk city areas where Bob navigates civilian and military presence; possession of NPCs provides cover and movement options
Factory and infrastructure sections requiring chained possession sequences to manipulate systems and progress; increasing environmental hostility
Climactic spaces designed for major combat encounters; Father Prime confrontation and Satan confrontation sequences
notable_level_patterns.example_level: Father Prime's facility, Moon dark side facility

notable_level_patterns.description: Nuclear power station and dimensional facility sections with maximum security; possession used as primary infiltration tool
